strengths: Extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, and Node.js across multiple production systems
Proven ability to own and ship complex systems, including open-source GIS platforms and AI-agent tooling
Strong architectural mindset with demonstrated interest in clean code, testing, and developer tooling
concerns: Job titles (e.g., Staff/Senior) suggest experience beyond junior/mid-level, raising fit questions for entry-level role
Limited explicit mention of PostgreSQL, Nest.js, or AWS services as required in job description
German language proficiency is only basic, while high on-site presence in Berlin is required
response.justification: Bogdan brings deep, diverse fullstack expertise with TypeScript and modern web architectures, aligning strongly with core technical needs; however, his senior-level title and limited German proficiency raise concerns about role fit and on-site collaboration, while key preferred skills like PostgreSQL and AWS are not clearly demonstrated.
